issues.description: First effect describes opponent's turn passive ability ('[Opponent's Turn]'), but DSL uses OnPlay trigger with EndOfTurn duration. Should be Trigger with duration:'DuringOpponentTurn' and condition on base cost = 1
Target scope should filter for Characters with base cost of 1 only, not all Characters. Current target lacks cost condition

Setting power to 0 should use action type that represents 'set to 0' (likely PowerBoost with special semantics or dedicated action), not negative power boost. Additionally, 'during this turn' = DuringYourTurn, not EndOfTurn
'during this turn' indicates DuringYourTurn duration, not EndOfTurn
